jobDescription: Iterable is the growth marketing platform that enables brands to create, execute and optimize campaigns to power world-class customer engagement across email, push, SMS, in-app and more with unparalleled data flexibility. We are an integrated, cross-channel solution— Iterable is built for marketers, trusted by engineers, and designed with intelligence. We know this space well: our product team built the growth systems that powered Twitter’s early success. We've recently raised a $50 M Series C from top-tier investors like Index Ventures and CRV, and hundreds of companies like Zillow, Seat Geek, and Box rely on us to captivate their many millions of users. Iterable's momentum grows daily and there has never been a more exciting time to join the team! We've been recognized as one of the Best Places to Work for two years running, earned ourselves a top 20 spot among the Saa S 1000, and we host an annual growth marketing conference where innovative marketers around the world come to share ideas. We have a nation-wide presence with offices in San Francisco, New York, and Denver, plus we’re expanding internationally as we open an office in London. The Role: As the IT Client Platform Engineer, you will join an awesome team to help provide a world-class customer service experience. You will redefine a highly productive employee technology experience for our company which includes providing operations support, project support and automation of services for our client’s end user platforms. We are looking for someone to play the roles of selling and supporting existing productivity tools which includes influencing future processes and products in collaboration with internal engineering teams and vendors as appropriate. Position Details: Provide exceptional hands-on support with a variety of end-user devices, such as Apple devices, Windows devices, printers, etc. You will build and deploy laptops using standard deployment tools: Azure/ Autopilot & DEPManage inventory for hardware and software You are familiar with coding languages like Ruby/ Python/ Powershell/ BASHWork with team to improve and document operational efficiency of and associated systems. Make strong, data driven decisions, in order to have a positive impact on Iterable Task management of assigned duties and responsibilities Ability to work within a “team oriented” environment Possesses very strong problem-solving skills and experience navigating through the IT infrastructure of enterprise organizations. Provide expert insight on patch management, software distribution, OS deployments Ensure security of data, network access, and backups of systems Audit systems and assess their outcomes The Ideal Candidate Will Have: Bachelor’s Degree in a technical field or equivalent experience5+ years in IT, software engineering, or operations2+ years in a technical security-related position at a Saa S company Solid technical background with understanding and/or hands-on experience in software systems and software development Intermediate networking skills, including an understanding of routers, switches, Wi Fi, etc. Excellent organizational and project management skills Excellent communication skills & detail oriented Bonus Points: Familiarity with enterprise email marketing and/or marketing automation solutions Desire to move into Engineering Perks & Benefits: Competitive salaries, meaningful equity, & 401(k) plan Medical, dental, vision, & life insurance Unlimited PTO, great work/life balance, and fantastic location Catered lunches delivered to the office daily + unlimited snacks/beverages Generous monthly Employee Wellness Allowance Professional Development Allowance of $300/quarter Pre-tax commuter benefits
